commercial_terms.payment_terms: Customer shall pay Vendor an annual subscription fee of $120,000 USD, invoiced quarterly in advance at $30,000 per quarter. All invoices are due Net-30 from the invoice date. Late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

renewal_and_termination.auto_renewal: Yes — auto-renews for successive one-year periods
renewal_and_termination.termination_notice_cause: 15 days to cure breach after notice

legal.dispute_resolution: binding arbitration in New York, NY under the rules of JAMS
legal.liability_cap: the total fees paid or payable by Customer in the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the claim

issue_details.description: Since the morning of July 15, Priya Mehta and three other Accounts Payable team members are unable to log into Oracle Financials, receiving an ORA-01017 error. This issue is blocking invoice processing and payment runs, with over 200 vendor invoices totaling approximately ₹1.8 crore needing processing by 5:00 PM IST. The problem is suspected to be due to an unsynced Oracle LDAP connector after an AD password rotation.

resolution.root_cause: Oracle LDAP connector sync job failed silently after AD rotation.
resolution.resolution_notes: Platform Engineering identified the root cause as a failed Oracle LDAP connector sync job after AD rotation. The LDAP sync was manually re-triggered and completed successfully, allowing all affected users to log in. A post-mortem is scheduled for July 17, and LDAP sync monitoring alert will be added.

deliverables: Scalable document ingestion and pre-processing pipeline supporting PDF, JPEG, PNG, and TIFF formats with OCR and quality assessment.
Document classification engine with multi-class support and ≥95% accuracy on test set.
Intelligent field extraction with named entity recognition and confidence scoring.
Validation and business rules engine with cross-document checks and audit logging.
Integration and API layer with REST API, webhook support, and admin dashboard.
Testing, UAT, and handover with ≥80% code coverage, UAT support, and training.

payment_milestones.name: Architecture Decision Record and Data Handling Agreement
Extraction Engine and Validation Rule Engine

line_items.description: Milestone 2 Delivery: Document Ingestion Pipeline & Classification Model (Beta) [per SOW ENT-SOW-2024-019, Milestone 2]
Additional Data Annotation Services — manual labelling of 1,200 edge-case documents [Change Order CO-2024-003, dated Oct 10, 2024]
Cloud Infrastructure Setup & Configuration — AWS account provisioning, VPC setup, IAM roles [one-time, billed at cost]
